playlist.title: Playlist
playlist.description: An IPTV playlist source with a name and URL.

id.description: Unique identifier for the playlist (client-side generated).

name.description: The descriptive name of the playlist.

url.description: The URL of the M3U/M3U8 playlist file.

category.description: The category the playlist belongs to.

order.description: The display sequence of the playlist.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when this entry was last modified.

playlistSettings.title: Playlist Settings
playlistSettings.description: A container for all playlists to optimize Firestore read costs.

channelVisibility.title: Channel Visibility
channelVisibility.description: Controls the visibility of a specific channel on the front-end.

channelId.description: The unique TVG ID of the channel.

visible.description: Whether the channel should be visible to users.

heroSlide.title: Hero Slide
heroSlide.description: A single slide for the homepage hero carousel.

title.description: The main headline of the slide.

subtitle.description: The supporting text below the headline.

cta.description: The text for the call-to-action button.

imageId.description: The ID of the image from placeholder-images.json.

service.title: Service
service.description: A service offered by the media agency.

description.description: A brief description of the service.

imageId.description: The ID of the image from placeholder-images.json.

/settings/playlists.description: Global application settings for playlists (Single doc for efficiency).

/channel_visibility/{channelId}.description: Stores visibility status for individual channels, keyed by TVG ID.

/hero_slides/{slideId}.description: Stores data for the homepage hero carousel slides.

/services/{serviceId}.description: Stores data for the media services offered.
